package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_compare_not_equal_zero: `bytes.Compare(...) != 0` instead of `!bytes.Equal(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario449Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.EqualFold(left, right)
}
